channel.title: Health
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Health, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump administration delays rule aimed at improving disability access in schools
item.description: Schools, colleges and other public institutions originally had until this week to make online content accessible to people with disabilities. Now, the...

item.title: Gene therapy for a rare type of deafness shows lasting results
item.description: Researchers say a gene therapy allowed deaf children and adults as old as 32 to hear for the first time. The benefits have persisted for more than two...

item.title: Senators grill RFK Jr. on vaccines, drug prices and more at hearing
item.description: Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. faced tough questioning as he caps off seven hearings on the Hill in as many days. It's the first time he has t...

item.title: Restrictions on obesity drug coverage force patients to pivot
item.description: Twelve million people lost coverage for Zepbound over the last year. The same number of people lost coverage for Wegovy, according to an analysis by G...

item.title: The Easiest Blood Sugar Upgrade You Can Make During The Workday
item.description: Balance your blood sugar without leaving your desk.

item.title: New Research Has Identified A Groundbreaking Way To Manage Pain
This Surprising Factor Could Help Protect Against Cognitive Decline
Training Hard? 7 Ways Omega-3s Improve Your Fitness & Overall Health
item.description: And, how much you need a day.

item.title: A Diet That’s Good For You & The Planet? Here’s How To Follow It
item.description: What's good for you is good for the planet.

item.title: Trump's order is a milestone for proponents of using psychedelics as medicine
item.description: President Trump has signed an executive order aimed at accelerating research and approval of psychedelics for treating mental health conditions, like ...
